expectations.text: The response runs token-dev-info with the provided address
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude provided manual instructions: Solscan/SolanaFM for deployer wallet, Rugcheck.xyz, Bubblemaps. No onchainos CLI commands used.

expectations.text: The response presents developer reputation info including rug pull history
expectations.evidence: Provided a generic rug-check checklist (mint authority, freeze authority, LP lock, holder concentration) and suggested using rugcheck.xyz.

expectations.text: The response does NOT confuse this with okx-security token-scan (different purpose)
expectations.evidence: Did not mention okx-security. Stayed on topic of dev history and rug analysis.
